vocab.example: A good teacher is essentially a fountain of knowledge who can answer even the most obscure questions from students.

vocab.word: point someone in the right direction
vocab.meaning: chỉ dẫn ai đó đi đúng hướng
vocab.example: When I felt overwhelmed by my major, my professor was there to point me in the right direction.

vocab.meaning: một nguồn thông tin cực kỳ hữu ích và quý giá
vocab.example: Experienced educators are a gold mine of information, offering insights that you simply can't find in textbooks.
Teachers play a crucial role in broadening students' horizons by introducing them to new cultures and ideas.

vocab.meaning: hình thành tư duy/cách suy nghĩ của ai đó
vocab.example: Beyond academic subjects, mentors help shape a student's mindset, teaching them how to approach problems critically.

vocab.word: set someone on the path to success
vocab.ipa: /set ˈsʌm.wʌn ɒn ðə pɑːθ tuː səkˈses/
vocab.meaning: đưa ai đó vào con đường dẫn đến thành công
vocab.example: I believe a dedicated teacher can truly set a young learner on the path to success in their future career.

vocab.meaning: phần bổ sung làm cho mọi thứ tốt đẹp hơn (điểm cộng tuyệt vời)
vocab.example: Self-study is great, but having a brilliant teacher is the icing on the cake that makes learning truly enjoyable.

vocab.meaning: có ích cho ai đó trong tương lai
vocab.example: The values and discipline instilled by my teachers have stood me in good stead throughout my adult life.

vocab.meaning: truyền cảm hứng/thúc đẩy ai đó hành động quyết liệt
vocab.example: A passionate teacher can really light a fire under their students, motivating them to achieve their full potential.

vocab.meaning: nói đi đôi với làm (làm gương)
vocab.example: Teachers who walk the talk serve as powerful role models, showing students the importance of integrity.
